page.title: Products
page.subtitle: Catalog of physical and digital products usable by AI agents.

header.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, SKU or description

table.empty: No products yet. Click "New product" to start.

modal.subtitle: Fill in the catalog details. Use variants for sizes/colors when needed.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Short product description (shown to the AI agent)
fields.labelsHint: Categories help filter products and may also be used by automation rules.

media.uploadHint: Drag images here or use the button below.

variants.name: Name (e.g. M, Blue)
variants.digitalHint: Variants are usually not used for digital products.

confirmDelete.title: Delete product?
confirmDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

import.title: Import products from CSV
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV with up to {{max}} rows. The file is parsed locally, validated against the catalog rules and sent to the bulk endpoint in a single transaction.
import.forbidden: You do not have permission to import products.

upload.hint: Select a UTF-8 CSV file with a header row. Limit: {{max}} rows.

errors.emptyFile: The CSV file has no header row.
errors.tooManyRows: CSV has {{received}} rows, but the limit is {{max}}.
errors.duplicateHeaders: CSV has duplicated column headers: {{headers}}. Rename them before uploading.
errors.emptyHeader: CSV has empty column header(s) at position: {{columns}}. Name every column before uploading.
errors.noDataRows: The CSV has only a header — no data rows to import.
errors.parseError: Failed to parse CSV at line {{line}}: {{message}}
errors.readError: Could not read the selected file.
errors.missingRequired: Map the required fields before continuing: {{fields}}
errors.noValidRows: There are no valid rows to send.
errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to bulk-import products.
errors.rateLimited: Rate limit reached (10 requests/minute). Wait a moment and try again.
errors.dryRunInvalid: Dry-run flagged {{count}} row(s). Fix them and try again.
errors.serverInvalid: The server rejected {{count}} row(s). The whole batch was rolled back.

parseErrorCodes.unexpected_quote: unexpected quote inside an unquoted field

serverErrors.invalid_status: must be active, inactive or draft
serverErrors.invalid_currency: must be BRL, USD or EUR
serverErrors.must_be_non_negative: must be greater than or equal to zero
serverErrors.invalid_url: must be a valid http(s) URL

pipelinePanel.title: Sold products
pipelinePanel.empty: No products linked to this card yet.
